headline: Prologis (PLD) Ascends But Remains Behind Market: Some Facts to Note
summary: Prologis (PLD) concluded the recent trading session at $132.18, signifying a +2.64% move from its prior day's close.

headline: How the Street Sees Prologis, Inc. (PLD) Investment Outlook Now
summary: Prologis, Inc. (NYSE:PLD) is among the 5 Most Profitable Real Estate Stocks Right Now. On March 17, John Kim from BMO Capital boosted the price target on Prologis, Inc. (NYSE:PLD) to $137 from $123 and reiterated a Market Perform rating. According to TheFly, the firm appears modestly bullish on Industrial REITs, with 2026 REIT guidance indicating […]
